programme.title: The Choral
programme.desc: A choral society's male members enlist in the First World War, leaving the demanding Dr Guthrie to recruit teenagers and experience the joy of singing.

programme.title: No Ordinary Heist
programme.desc: Inspired by the 2004 Northern Bank robbery, two feuding bank employees are forced to execute Ireland's biggest heist after criminals kidnap their families.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a NYC high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances.

programme.title: One Last Deal
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent races to secure a final lucrative contract for his star client, as both their careers and lives hang in the balance. Starring Danny Dyer.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A young athlete descends into a world of terror when he's invited to train with a legendary champion whose charisma curdles into something darker.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, The Internship, to violently destroy the organisation.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Plague
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Language/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a NYC high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman involved in a car accident wakes up in a cramped underground bunker with two men she's never met. Tense thriller.

programme.title: The Parenting
programme.desc: Planning to introduce their parents to each other, a couple find that their rental is home to a poltergeist. Contains discriminatory language.

programme.title: Friendship's Death
programme.desc: When aliens send a female android diplomat to Earth, she accidentally lands in war-torn Palestine, where she meets a friendly British journalist.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A getaway turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests, a subservient android built for human companionship, has gone haywire.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: In the last city on Earth, super assassin Charlize Theron fights to overthrow the sinister government. Futuristic action with Jonny Lee Miller. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Paycheck
programme.desc: Ben Affleck sells three years of his memory, but on payday there's no cash and he's wanted for murder. Sci-fi based on a story by Philip K Dick. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: In the distant future, father and son Will and Jaden Smith crash land on an abandoned Earth, which has evolved to destroy human life. Sci-fi epic. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: This film has outdated attitudes, language and cultural depictions which may cause offence today. Hero Flash Gordon races to save Earth from the Emperor Ming.

programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Caretaking a remote hotel, writer Jack Nicholson slowly succumbs to murderous insanity. Stanley Kubrick directs this unsettling horror classic. Contains violent scenes.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Hip horror movie about four female students who band together and become witches. Starring Fairuza Balk, Robin Tunney and Neve Campbell.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A virus turns the residents of a small town into murderous maniacs. Horror with Timothy Olyphant. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Vin Diesel stars in this high tension action sci-fi as a murderous convict who becomes the last hope for the survivors of an intergalactic crash.

programme.title: 47 Meters Down
programme.desc: Stranded in a shark cage at the bottom of the ocean, two sisters fight to survive as their oxygen starts to run out and the great whites circle.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: In the last city on Earth, super assassin Charlize Theron fights to overthrow the sinister government. Futuristic action with Jonny Lee Miller. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Gator Creek
programme.desc: Vacation turns to disaster when Kyle and her friends survive a plane crash in the Louisiana Bayou, only to discover something infinitely worse lurking in the shallows.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Spielberg
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the brand-new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are truly tricera-top tier.

programme.title: Arcadian
programme.desc: On a decimated Earth, a father and his twin sons must fight to survive against the ferocious creatures who awaken at night. Horror thriller starring Nicolas Cage.

programme.title: WestWorld
programme.desc: Michael Crichton directs this classic sci-fi thriller about robots going rogue in a futuristic adult theme park. Yul Brynner stars alongside Richard Benjamin.

programme.title: Presence
programme.desc: A family becomes convinced they are not alone after moving into their new home in the suburbs.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Spielberg
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the brand-new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are truly tricera-top tier.

programme.title: Tim Burton's Corpse Bride
programme.desc: A nervy bridegroom practising his vows in a graveyard inadvertently finds himself with an undead spouse. Wild fantasy animation.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain Hook kidnaps his kids, an adult Peter Pan returns to Neverland to save them. Adventure starring Robin Williams. Flashing images.

programme.title: The BFG
programme.desc: Adaptation of the beloved Roald Dahl tale starring Mark Rylance as the lovable giant who befriends a headstrong young orphan. From Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's hugely successful sci-fi drama about a young boy who makes friends with a stranded alien. With Drew Barrymore and Henry Thomas. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Police chief Roy Scheider hunts the killer shark menacing his peaceful seaside community. Spielberg's classic thriller. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Empire Of The Sun
programme.desc: Spoilt youngster Christian Bale fights to survive a Japanese POW camp alongside American scrounger John Malkovich. Epic WWII drama from Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Leo DiCaprio stars as the teen conman who led the FBI on a paper chase, with Tom Hanks as the agent on his trail. Real-life caper from Steven Spielberg. Strong language.

programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: Publisher Katharine and her editor-in-chief Ben put their careers and freedom at risk to uncover a scandalous decades-long secret about the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays the gutsy mum who takes on a corporation polluting local water. Oscar winner from Steven Soderbergh, with the late Albert Finney. Strong language.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Oscar-winning Mikey Madison stars as a sex worker who impulsively marries an oligarch's son, whose family try to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: In 2020, a standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg. Language/violence/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Presence
programme.desc: A family becomes convinced they are not alone after moving into their new home in the suburbs.

programme.title: Through A Glass Darkly

programme.title: Fanny And Alexander
programme.desc: Two young Swedish children in the 1900s experience the many comedies and tragedies of their lively and affectionate theatrical family, the Ekdahls.

programme.title: Cries And Whispers
programme.desc: When Maria and Karin visit their terminally ill sister Agnes to take care of her, feelings of resentment start to resurface.

programme.title: Eye In The Sky
programme.desc: Helen Mirren stars as a no-nonsense British colonel trying to get the go ahead for a drone strike. Thriller with the late Alan Rickman.

programme.title: Maggie Moore(s)
programme.desc: A police chief investigates the bizarre murders of two women with the same name and unravels a web of small-town lies. Sky Original comedy thriller with Jon Hamm.

programme.title: The Surfer
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage returns to the beach of his childhood to surf, where he is drawn into a conflict that pushes him to his breaking point. Thriller.

programme.title: Captain Phillips

programme.desc: Retired tough guy Denzel Washington returns to his old ways to protect a girl from Russian gangsters. Slick thriller with Chloe Grace Moretz.

programme.desc: A widowed mother who goes to a restaurant to meet Henry, her charming date. However, her pleasant evening soon turns into a living nightmare.

The con game fails to play out as planned when Bloom falls in love with the irresistible woman.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: Based on a story by famed science fiction writer Philip K. Dick, "Minority Report" is an action-detective thriller set in Washington D.C. in 2054, where police utilize a psychic technology to arrest and convict murderers before they commit their crime. Tom Cruise plays the head of this Precrime unit and is himself accused of the future murder of a man he hasn't even met.

But taking off her clothes for a paying audience is the easy part at the Player's Club. programme.title: South of Caliente
programme.desc: A singing cowboy (Roy Rogers) trailers a horsewoman's (Dale Evans) prize mare through danger.

programme.title: Walk of Shame
programme.desc: Meghan (Elizabeth Banks) is an aspiring news anchor in the cutthroat world of Los Angeles television. After an audition for her dream job ends in failure, she goes out for an uncharacteristic night of partying. The next morning, she awakes in a stranger's bed and hears a phone message from her agent telling her the job is hers if she can make it across town by 5:00 pm. Stranded in an unknown area

programme.title: Turbulence
programme.desc: Zach and Emmy's romantic retreat aboard a hot-air balloon takes a terrifying turn when they get hijacked by a sinister third passenger with a link to Zach's past. As the mystery of their secret relationship is revealed, their spectacular ride becomes a brutal chess match and a lethal battle high in the sky.

programme.title: Away From Her
programme.desc: Long married, Fiona (Julie Christie) and Grant (Gordon Pinsent) find their mutual devotion tested by her struggle with Alzheimer's disease. When it becomes apparent that the condition is worsening, she checks into a rest home. programme.title: Trading Mom
programme.desc: A magic spell allows two unhappy children (Anna Chlumsky, Aaron Michael Metchik) to forget their mother (Sissy Spacek) and shop for a new one.

programme.title: The Moon and Back
programme.desc: High school senior Lydia Gilbert feels lost after her father's death, until she discovers a space opera script written by him. Equipped with a VHS camera and pocket change, she decides to honor her dad and make the script a reality.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S. is invited to the Smithsonian to receive an award for inventing a perpetual motion machine. Without telling any of his family, he boards a freight train heading to Washington, D.C., to attend the ceremony.

programme.title: Air Bound
programme.desc: A city mouse and his friends stow away on a ship headed for Dream Island, hoping to save their families from a sinister white weasel.

programme.title: Legend of Kung Fu Rabbit
programme.desc: A rabbit (Jon Heder) and a martial-arts prodigy (Rebecca Black) must save a kung-fu academy.

programme.title: The Giant Mechanical Man
programme.desc: A street performer (Chris Messina) and an unemployed woman (Jenna Fischer), who's under constant pressure from her sister, help each other realize that it only takes a single person to engender someone's self-worth.

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: In the present, artist Tom Warshaw recalls his traumatic coming of age. As a 13-year-old growing up in New York City in 1973, Tom hangs out with Pappass, a mentally disabled man. With Tom's mother battling depression after the death of her husband, the young boy is left to his own devices. When Tom develops a crush on schoolmate Melissa, Pappass feels abandoned and begins behaving erratically.

Hays Hodges (Tommy Lee Jones), a comrade-in-arms who owes his life to Childers.

programme.title: Maharaj

programme.desc: A young man battling premature balding faces ridicule and insecurity. Through humor and self-realization, he learns that confidence and self-acceptance define beauty beyond physical appearance.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
programme.desc: A psychiatrist unravels strange events in an ancestral mansion haunted by secrets. As science clashes with superstition, a shocking truth emerges in this gripping psychological horror-comedy.

programme.desc: Anjali loves her best friend Rahul but is heartbroken when he marries Tina. Years later, Rahul's daughter, knowing their past, sets out to reunite him with Anjali, hoping for a second chance at love.

programme.title: Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari
programme.desc: After their partners, Ananya and Vikram, heartlessly dump them to marry each other, Sunny and Tulsi form an unlikely alliance. Together, they plot to gatecrash their exes' big wedding.

programme.title: Bhoothnath Returns

programme.desc: Six lovers reincarnate after 600 years, meeting again in modern times with hilarious consequences. Mixing fantasy, comedy, and romance, it's a chaotic story of love beyond lifetimes.
